visual_analysis: The layout is well-organized, with a clear hierarchy that emphasizes the layers of the OSI model. The use of color is visually appealing and enhances clarity, although a bit more contrast might improve accessibility. The typography is clean and easy to read, contributing to an overall polished look.
educational_analysis: The educational concept is clearly communicated through the structure and labeling of the OSI layers. The explanatory text provides context, enhancing comprehension. The interactive elements suggest engagement, but the effectiveness in conveying deeper pedagogical principles would benefit from additional instructional details.
